mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (admin_id, reservation_date, reservation_time, name, phone, apply_date, register_date, change_date, amount, repayment_date, status) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{reservationDate}, #{reservationTime}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{applyDate}, #{registerDate}, #{changeDate}, #{amount}, #{repaymentDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, apply_date = #{applyDate}, register_date = #{registerDate}, change_date = #{changeDate}, amount = #{amount}, repayment_date = #{repaymentDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_id, reservation_date, reservation_time, name, phone, apply_date, register_date, change_date, amount, repayment_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, admin_id, reservation_date, reservation_time, name, phone, apply_date, register_date, change_date, amount, repayment_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY reservation_date, reservation_time

SELECT id, admin_id, reservation_date, reservation_time, name, phone, apply_date, register_date, change_date, amount, repayment_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND reservation_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY reservation_date, reservation_time

SELECT id, admin_id, reservation_date, reservation_time, name, phone, apply_date, register_date, change_date, amount, repayment_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE reservation_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY reservation_date, reservation_time
